CustomField.description: Set to true by NEPA_GIS_Proximity_Check when the project location intersects a USACE Formerly Used Defense Sites (FUDS) Munitions Response Site. Triggers RCRA and/or CERCLA hazardous waste review requirement and Army Corps coordination. Projects near FUDS sites may face remediation obligations before construction can proceed. Source: USACE FUDS FeatureServer.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Project intersects a USACE Formerly Used Defense Site (FUDS) with munitions or hazardous waste. RCRA/CERCLA review and Army Corps coordination required.
CustomField.label: USACE FUDS Hazardous Site Flag
